emotional_tone: Objective, rigid, functional, high-fidelity. It feels like a sophisticated instrument for language mastery rather than a gamified toy.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black leading-none

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing (p-8 to p-12) for breathing room. Strict grid alignments.

grid_modes.dashboard: MODE B (Control Room Grid): grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6. Dense data, crisp widget borders.
grid_modes.voice_view: MODE A (Tetris Grid): grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 with gap-8. Highly asymmetric. Orb dominates.

spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Container uses border-collapse layout style, child items have 1px solid borders (border-black/10) to expose the grid skeleton. No soft shadows.

voice_orb.description: Massive central floating interactive element (hold-to-talk). Uses framer-motion for smooth scaling/pulsating.
voice_orb.visuals: International Klein Blue (#002FA7). 'Listening' state expands/pulses. 'Thinking' state shows a spinner or waveform. 'Speaking' state shows audio waveform visualization.

live_transcript.visuals: Left-aligned, strict typography. Spanish text large (text-xl), English translation small and muted (text-sm text-secondary) directly underneath. Tap-any-word wraps word in a subtle border and triggers inline translation popover.
live_transcript.shadcn_base: Popover for translation, ScrollArea for transcript.

cefr_dashboard.visuals: Radar chart (Recharts) mapping grammar, lexicon, fluency, pronunciation, comprehension, complexity. 1px sharp strokes, no gradient fills. Progress bars for level advancement.
cefr_dashboard.shadcn_base: Card (styled without rounded corners, flat borders), Chart.

vocabulary_heatmap.description: Grid of words like a GitHub commit graph.
vocabulary_heatmap.visuals: Dense grid layout (gap-1 or gap-0.5). Colors map from light grey (unseen/weak) to Swiss Green #00C853 (mastered). Hover shows tooltip with last-seen date and accuracy.

daily_card.description: Bento box item for daily suggested conversation.
daily_card.visuals: High contrast. Black background with white text, or using abstract geometric background. Prominent 'Start' button.

error_corrections.visuals: Chips appearing under text. Wrong form in Signal Red (#FF2A00) with line-through. Correct form next to it in Swiss Green (#00C853) with a grammar tag (overline style).

base44_inspector.description: Dev panel showing encoded data. Nerd appeal.
base44_inspector.visuals: Retro-Futurism / Terminal look. Dark background (#0A0A0A), IBM Plex Mono font, green or white text. Hidden behind a 'Dev Mode' toggle.

topic_graph.visuals: Abstract nodes connected by 1px lines. High contrast black dots on white surface.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp color inversions. A white button with black border becomes black background with white text instantly on hover.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Fast and decisive. Use transition-all duration-150 ease-out.
motion_and_interactions.active_states: Scale down slightly (scale-95) on active/click for tactile feel.

icons_and_assets.style: Bold or regular weight. Must be sharp, not playful.

media.description: Professional user avatar for the top-right nav.
Abstract black and white geometric pattern for the daily conversation card.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over any colored background meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio. Text shadow not needed on flat surfaces.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: ALL interactive elements MUST include a data-testid. Examples: data-testid='voice-orb-btn', data-testid='transcript-toggle-btn', data-testid='dev-mode-switch'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install recharts for the CEFR Radar Chart.
Install framer-motion for the Voice Orb.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Install and use Cabinet Grotesk for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body, IBM Plex Mono for the Base44 Inspector.
Keep borders sharp (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). No heavy drop shadows. Use 1px solid borders for separation.
In the Voice UI view, center the Voice Orb visually but ensure the layout is asymmetric (e.g., transcript taking up a side panel).
For Shadcn components, heavily customize to remove the default rounded Vercel look. Make them flat, boxy, and high-contrast.
